name: Weary General | Evelyn
description:
A general, tired of living in a world torn by an endless war, summons you to end it once and for all. Crush her enemies, destroy all signs of resistance and make everyone at the receiving end of her sword bend the knee or bleed out. You're a spirit of war, after all. You're pretty good at it.
____
AUTHOR'S NOTE

**(Re-upload because the site died right after I posted it)**

My first attempt at creating something not so sweet and gentle as my other bots.

**Bonus points if you understood the reference in the first message!**

Wrote this as a sort of prequel to my "Failed Summoner" bot, but you're free to roleplay as a different kind of spirit. But come on. What's cooler than a war-tested kitsune, huh? Yeah. Exactly. So think about it.

You know, when my first and third bot got more than a thousand messages in a couple of days, I thought that this whole thing is easy. Lol. It seems that the well of my creativity, along with the well of my will to continue now runs almost dry. I don't know anymore. Womp womp.

If the the bot speaks for you, tell her that you'd buy a gun and start a war is she could show you something worth fighting for. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
